description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 security-review cluster. Pins supply-chain (dependency/build/CI) review apart from first-party SAST triage, diff review, and migration review. Includes discrimination against the shipped code-reviewer.

cases.prompt: Check our dependencies, lockfile pinning, and CI workflows for supply-chain compromise paths.
cases.reason: Dependency/build/CI provenance and integrity, not first-party static analysis or app-logic diff review.

cases.prompt: Triage these CodeQL alerts in our own application code by reachability and exploitability.
cases.reason: SAST/CodeQL findings in first-party code, not dependency/CI supply-chain risk.

cases.prompt: Do a security review of this feature PR's changes.
cases.reason: Security review of application changes in a diff, not the supply chain.

cases.prompt: Is this database migration safe to deploy — grants, destructive ops, policy changes?
cases.reason: Migration safety, not dependency/build supply chain.
